items.claim: Rafael Fiziev has lost four of his last five fights.
items.quote: Fiziev's been a loser in four of his last five fights.

items.claim: Manuel Torres would lose to Justin Gaethje in a matchup.
items.quote: If Manuel Torres fights Justin Gaethje twice, he loses both.

items.claim: Manuel Torres would lose to Moise Hoofi in a matchup.
items.quote: if he fights Manuel Moise Hoofi, he loses as well.

items.claim: Rafael Fiziev's wrestling is a luxury rather than a primary path to victory.
items.quote: Ultimately though, that is a luxury for Fiziev.

items.claim: Manuel Torres's recent opponents have been stylistically favorable matchups for him.
items.quote: the guys he's fighting are, you know, they're good fighters, but they're fights that are meant out for him to win.
